history.action: Initialized SDLC workflow. Token minted and assigned to Analyst.
Completed Phase 1. User stories and acceptance criteria finalized.
Completed Phase 2. ADRs, system architecture, and JSON schemas finalized.
Completed Phase 3. Full SvelteKit app, engine, stores, components, CI/CD, and unit tests created.
Completed Phase 4. All unit, integration, and E2E tests created and passing. QA sign-off granted.
Sprint 1 closed. Hotfixes merged. Sprint 2 opened. Architect confirmed game-config.schema.json covers Spider Solitaire without changes. Token passed to Developer.

Sprint 2 Spider Solitaire implementation complete. Delivered: DescendingAnySuitStrategy, dealPattern engine extension, spider/config.json (2 decks, 10 cols, 104 cards), 26 unit tests (71 total passing). CSP bug fixed (empty page on dev). Feature branch feature/spider-solitaire pushed to origin. Handed off to QA.

FreeCell schema approved. No engine refactoring needed. Architecture leverages existing freeCells pile type, descending-alternating-color strategy (pre-registered), and dealPattern support. Created ADR-005, freecell-schema-design.md, updated game-config.schema.json with dealPattern field, created src/games/freecell/config.json template. Ready for Developer implementation.

Sprint 2 context finalized. Analyst phase: 3 requirement docs + 7 user stories + [Final] acceptance criteria. Architect phase: ADR-005 + schema design + zero-refactor validation. Sprint status documented (sprint-status-2026-05-05.md). Developer phase ready to begin. All handoff artifacts in place. Workflow proceeding as planned. Token confirmed with Developer.

FreeCell implementation complete. 72 new unit tests (143 total). Engine: freeCells array, MoveValidator freeCell case, StateManager freeCell case, allFaceUp deal logic. feature/freecell-implementation pushed to origin. PR_SUMMARY.md created. Prerender fix (+layout.js) applied to main.
Sprint 3 opened: Game Selector UI. New requirement: user can switch between Klondike, Spider, FreeCell from the UI. Token passed to Analyst.

Game Selector analysis complete. Delivered: game-selector-problem-statement.md, game-selector-user-stories.md (6 stories with Gherkin), game-selector-acceptance-criteria.md (13 criteria, [Final]). Handoff trigger met — passing to Architect.

Game Selector architecture complete. Delivered: ADR-006-game-selector-architecture.md (Option A: in-page reactive store, no route-per-game), HANDOFF-GS-ARCHITECT.md with full implementation task list. Component design: GAME_REGISTRY, activeGame store, GameSelector.svelte, Header integration, +page.svelte reactive switch. Token passed to Developer.

Game Selector implementation complete. Delivered: registry.ts (GAME_REGISTRY + getGameConfig), activeGame.ts (persisted store), GameSelector.svelte (ARIA listbox + keyboard nav), Header.svelte wired, +page.svelte rewritten (reactive config/engine/store, confirmation dialog, auto-deal). 12 new unit tests (83 total passing). Build clean. PR_SUMMARY-game-selector.md created. feature/game-selector pushed to origin (commit 65ec430). Token passing to QA.
Developer → QA handoff triggered. PR_SUMMARY-game-selector.md present, 83 unit tests passing, build succeeds. HANDOFF-GS-QA.md created. Token assigned to QA for Game Selector sign-off.
